name: /standards-monitor each iteration runs fetch and diff and gap-analysis in that order
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: [{id: owasp-asvs}]\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-monitor.sh" --watch --once --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --emit pipeline 2>out.txt && grep -q 'step1=fetch' out.txt && grep -q 'step2=diff' out.txt && grep -q 'step3=gap-analysis' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
